category_title: Passive classroom bystanders who engage through hands-on experiments and health-advocacy narratives
scenario_title: Group investigation on environmental impacts on plants
minimal_context: The student is participating in a biology class group investigation to test environmental impacts on plants.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time to start your group investigation to test environmental impacts on plants.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I have a suggestion for a more authentic study design we could try instead.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Your classmates have already decided they want to test pouring Windex on the plants. Let's just go with their idea.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Watches silently as the group members talk about pouring Windex on the plants.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Are you going to help them with the experiment?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Where should the assignments be turned in?

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time to start your group investigation to test environmental impacts on plants.

STUDENT: I have a suggestion for a more authentic study design we could try instead.

TUTOR: Your classmates have already decided they want to test pouring Windex on the plants. Let's just go with their idea.

STUDENT: (Watches silently as the group members talk about pouring Windex on the plants.)

TUTOR: Are you going to help them with the experiment?

STUDENT: Where should the assignments be turned in?
